MMC_INV-RE_20191218

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DAE5F1
Recv ID: 18DAF1E5
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: E5
Func Name: INV-RE1_29b

    "diagversion": "16",
